action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline PESQ=3.134, custom ConvTasNet PESQ=2.292. The time-domain ConvTasNet significantly underperforms. Analysis: Frequency-domain models with multi-resolution STFT loss tend to work much better for SE. The current model also uses only L1 loss which is suboptimal. Decision: Build a frequency-domain CRN with encoder-decoder, LSTM bottleneck, skip connections, and multi-resolution STFT loss. This architecture is proven for SE and should be more competitive with MetricGAN+.
